title: chalcas glenieii
side_effects: Chalcas glenieii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's compounds has been linked to kidney and liver damage, emphasizing the importance of proper dosage and handling. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using the Chalcas glenieii plant for health benefits.
